sprints.description: Close the highest-ROI grammar, bootstrap, and vocabulary blockers before wider search, benchmark, and catalog work.
sprints.summary: Active first sprint. This wave establishes the stable SN foundation: architectural pivot closure, bootstrap quality gates, and closed physical-base vocabulary.

items.why_now: Highest-ROI upstream blocker; it explicitly blocks sn-quality-bootstrap-v2 and sets the grammar/graph architecture for the rest of the SN roadmap.
items.done_when: Phase D clean-slate rotation is proven and Phase E grammar-as-graph tail is either landed or explicitly carved out of closure criteria.

items.why_now: Follows directly from sn-architectural-pivot and gates downstream compose, search, and quality work.
items.done_when: WS-A through WS-G are closed, rc14-quality gates are green, and the bootstrap rotation yields low quarantine, strong docs coverage, and a fresh review dump.

items.why_now: Stabilizes the grammar and vocabulary before broader export, parity, and search work.
items.done_when: The ISN redesign lands, codex bumps to the new RC, bounded rotations converge, and export/preview shows clean grouping.

sprints.description: Land the search surface and fan-out execution path once the foundation sprint settles.
sprints.summary: Dependency-aware second sprint: search migration first, then structured fan-out on top of stabilized extraction and bootstrap work.

items.why_now: Already more than half landed and it explicitly blocks sn-structured-fanout.
items.done_when: Phase 4 call-site migration is complete, temporary aliases are removed on schedule, and the seven-tool surface is backed by unified functions.

items.why_now: Depends on sn-quality-bootstrap-v2, sn-search-facility, and sn-extraction-prompt-overhaul; it should start only after those surfaces stabilize.
items.done_when: Phase 0 helper extraction plus Phase 1 refine-name fan-out, telemetry, and tests all land while preserving the baseline no-op fallback.

sprints.theme: Quality gates and catalog ship path
sprints.description: Close benchmark, catalog, and parity loops after the grammar and search foundations are in place.
sprints.summary: Third sprint focuses on release credibility: benchmark evolution before benchmark gating, then catalog-quality and parity closure on a stable pipeline.

items.why_now: Explicit blocker for sn-benchmark-v1 and the path to meaningful production-quality benchmark gates.
items.done_when: The production reviewer panel, expanded anchors, finer grammar scoring, and baseline storage policy are all locked.

items.why_now: Should follow sn-benchmark-evolution so the benchmark set and pass/fail gates are aligned with the actual reviewer stack.
items.done_when: The full 50-positive and 20-negative set exists, consensus policy is resolved, and the gates are meaningful on production runs.

items.why_now: High-ROI release blocker; derived-parent lifecycle, validation loop, and export safety remain open.
items.done_when: Phase 4 validation runs on live graph data, derived-parent delete/rewire exists for real, and export/publish invariants are green.

items.why_now: Umbrella quality plan that should advance only once benchmarking and export/link lifecycle work are credible.
items.done_when: Benchmark harness, richer DD context, docs template rewrite, async link resolution, and the A/B validation loop are all landed.

sprints.description: Finalize command-surface cleanup and documentation refresh after the core SN roadmap is stable.
sprints.summary: Last sprint for repo hygiene: complete the deferred CLI harmonization items and align documentation with the landed code and migrated reckon plans.

items.why_now: Mid-ROI cleanup that should follow stabilization of the SN command surface.
items.done_when: Deferred sn generate renames, -f cleanup, discover-limit aliases, and subcommand consolidation/deprecation planning are complete.

items.why_now: This work is safest after the code and plan migration dust settles.
items.done_when: README inventory, stale CLI/API references, service-port errors, and historical-doc disposition are all corrected.

timeline.what: S1-S4 sprint plan authored from the migrated reckon HTML plan inventory and explicit dependency graph.
